title: Sequences
description: Write program sequences to count the number of all non-decreasing sequences of length n containing integers from 1 to m, where every element can occur at most k times.
input: On the standard input, there are given integers n, m and k, separated by spaces.
output: On the standard output, your program has to print the count of the described sequences.
source: Olympiad, International Autumn Tournament in Informatics, 2017, Group B (Juniors)
